sentences.arabic: الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ هُوَ تِقْنِيَّةٌ حَدِيثَةٌ تُغَيِّرُ الْعَالَمَ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija je moderna tehnologija koja mijenja svijet.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is a modern technology that is changing the world.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلْحَوَاسِيبِ الْآنَ حَلُّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الْمُعَقَّدَةِ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Računari sada mogu veoma brzo rješavati složene probleme.
sentences.translationEn: Computers can now solve complex problems very quickly.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةُ تُسَاعِدُ الْأَطِبَّاءَ فِي الْمُسْتَشْفَيَاتِ وَالْمُهَنْدِسِينَ فِي الْمَصَانِعِ.
sentences.translation: Ova tehnologija pomaže ljekarima u bolnicama i inženjerima u fabrikama.
sentences.translationEn: This technology helps doctors in hospitals and engineers in factories.
